entry: \forall Heap h; \forall Object o; \forall Field f; \forall Object o2; \forall Field f2; \forall any v; select<[any]>(store(h,o,f,v), o2, f2)<<Trigger>> = \if(o = o2 & f = f2 & f != java.lang.Object::#$created) \then(v) \else(select<[any]>(h, o2, f2))

\forall Heap h; \forall Object o; \forall Field f; \forall Heap h2; \forall LocSet ls; select<[any]>(anon(h, ls, h2), o, f)<<Trigger>> = \if(elementOf(o, f, ls) & f != java.lang.Object::#$created | elementOf(o, f, freshLocs(h))) \then(select<[any]>(h2, o, f)) \else(select<[any]>(h, o, f))

\forall Heap h; \forall LocSet s; \forall any x; \forall Object o; \forall Field f; select<[any]>(memset(h, s, x), o, f)<<Trigger>> = \if(elementOf(o, f, s) & f != java.lang.Object::#$created) \then(x) \else(select<[any]>(h, o, f))

\forall Heap h; \forall Object o; \forall Object o2; \forall Field f; select<[any]>(create(h, o), o2, f)<<Trigger>> = \if(o = o2 & o != null & f = java.lang.Object::#$created) \then(TRUE) \else(select<[any]>(h, o2, f))

\forall Heap h; \forall Object o; \forall Field f; (wellFormed(h) -> select<[boolean]>(h, (select<[java.lang.Object]>(h, o, f))<<Trigger>>, java.lang.Object::#$created) = TRUE | (select<[java.lang.Object]>(h, o, f)) = null)
